content:
✔ Instead, they complete an annotated bibliography & peer review.
✔ If they achieve three perfect scores, they “take over” one class session.

✅ Symbolism of Three → Religious, literary, and cultural significance.

📊 8. Grading & Assignment Balance

🚀 Ensuring Paths Are Evenly Weighted
• Each path has an equal workload.
• Built-in “drop lowest grade” incentive.

📊 Balance Calculation
• Total Assignments Per Path = Evenly Distributed (~Same Hours Per Week).
• No Path Is “Easier”—Just Different Formats of Labor.

✅ Why This Works:
• Eliminates “busywork” while maintaining rigor.
• Supports different learning styles.

📌 Final Checks Before Lock-In
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 103 (chunk 103/108)
